sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Try toggling track 6 UP and track 8 DOWN
action([
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 57, 'col': 38},  # track 6 UP
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 57, 'col': 46},  # track 8 DOWN
])

# Check state
seg = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
print("Current colored markers:")
for n in seg:
    if n['color'] in ['c', 'N', 'p', 'Y'] and n['pixels'] < 10:
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"  color={n['color']}, px={n['pixels']}, r={min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, c={min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")

print("\nLevel completed?", last_action_result.get('level_completed', False))
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
